title: Harden AW trust continuity and projection boundaries
lane_outcome: Make the seven #2173 child invariants true in ordinary product paths, each with issue-specific regression evidence and a separately reviewable PR.
purpose_for_parent: Close #2173 only after #2174 through #2180 are closed or deliberately rerouted with residual intent preserved.
technical_strategy: Implement each child as a representative vertical slice backed by one reusable authoritative contract. Keep branches independent from master unless a later child consumes a newly introduced contract; in that case stack only that dependency chain and retarget after the base lands.
technology_choices: Reuse existing contract and packet families before adding visible concepts
Use stable reason codes, explicit provenance, freshness, scope, and decision maturity
Preserve raw/local evidence while governing trusted or promoted derivatives
acceptance_boundary: All lane slices have landed, lane proof aggregation is satisfied, and residual work is routed.
proof_strategy: For every child, run routed changed-path proof plus the issue's required regression cases. Aggregate merged PRs, exact validation commands, and any residual owner before closing the lane.

evidence: #2181: focused proof receipt tests, workspace suite, generated package checks, lint, typecheck, and CI
#2182: 318 session/startup/proof tests including three-context and branch round-trip replay, lint, typecheck, and CI
#2183: 339 startup/implement tests plus live pre-edit and post-edit intent replay, lint, typecheck, and CI
#2184: 228 doctor/status tests plus repeated-doctor stable digest replay, lint, typecheck, and CI
#2185: 230 projection/doctor/report tests plus measured doctor/report work and output reduction, lint, typecheck, and CI
#2186: 32 session semantic tests after master rebase plus workspace CI
#2187: 215 session/workspace tests, absolute-path hygiene, lint, typecheck, and CI
known_gaps: Child PRs remain unmerged; issue closure transitions are pending review and merge.
#2185 must land after #2184, then be retargeted to master and revalidated.
Parent #2173 must remain open until every child is closed or deliberately rerouted.

residual_lane_work: Review and merge #2181-#2187; merge #2184 before #2185, retarget #2185 to master after its base lands, verify child issue closure, then aggregate landed proof and close #2173.
lane_to_epic_contribution: Provides the trust, continuity, projection, invocation, promotion, and intent-routing invariants named by #2173 without absorbing #2172 mutation-outcome scope.

closeout_state.summary: All child implementations are published and review-ready; lane closure remains merge-dependent.
closeout_state.residual_work: Merge child PRs, retarget the one dependency stack, confirm child issue closure, and rerun final landed-state proof.

notes: Implementation order follows the lane owner's recommendation. #2175 and #2180 may share scope/provenance concepts but remain separate review units; #2177 precedes #2176 so projection reuse does not cache unstable action semantics.
